today.completeYesterday: Complete yesterday's lesson requirements to unlock:

journal.title: Journal
journal.entriesAppearHere: Your journal entries will appear here
journal.noReflections: No written reflections for this day
journal.signInToSave: Please sign in to save your journal entries.

lesson.gratitudeDefault: What are you grateful for today on your wellness journey?
lesson.writeResponse: Please write at least one response before saving.
lesson.journalSaved: Your journal entry has been saved.
lesson.greatJob: Great job! You've completed today's movement.
lesson.markWhenDone: Mark as complete when you've done today's movement
lesson.requireJournal: Please complete your journal entry (all 3 prompts) and daily movement before completing this lesson.
lesson.requireJournalOnly: Please answer all journal prompts (Today's Reflection, Deeper Reflection, and Gratitude) before completing this lesson.
lesson.requireMovementOnly: Please complete and log your daily movement before completing this lesson.
lesson.failedComplete: Failed to mark lesson as complete.

community.title: Community
community.beFirst: Be the first to share your wellness journey! Complete lessons and earn badges to automatically share your progress.
community.deletePostConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
community.failedCreatePost: Failed to create post. Please try again.
community.unlockText: Subscribe to connect with fellow wellness seekers, share your journey, and encourage others on their path.
community.joinText: Subscribe to share your journey and connect with others on the path to wellness.

communitySettings.title: Community Settings
communitySettings.bioPlaceholder: Tell others about your wellness journey...
communitySettings.publicProfileDesc: Allow others to find and follow you
communitySettings.showStreakDesc: Display your current streak on your profile
communitySettings.autoShareDesc: Automatically share your achievements with the community. You can always delete posts later.
communitySettings.failedSave: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emptyBadges: Complete lessons and journal entries to earn badges!
profile.chooseReminderTime: Choose when you'd like to receive your daily wellness lesson reminder
profile.disableBiometricConfirm: Are you sure you want to disable {{type}} login?
profile.enterPassword: Enter your password to enable {{type}} login
profile.noSavedCredentials: No saved credentials found. Please sign in with email and password.
profile.failedSaveCredentials: Failed to save credentials. Please try again.
profile.enableNotificationsSettings: Please enable notifications in Settings to receive daily reminders.
profile.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all data
profile.deleteAccountConfirm:
This will permanently delete your account and all your data, including progress, journal entries, and subscription. This action cannot be undone.

Are you absolutely sure?
profile.finalConfirmationText: This is your last chance. Deleting your account will remove all your data permanently.
profile.accountDeletedText: Your account and all data have been permanently deleted.
profile.failedDeleteAccount: Failed to delete account. Please contact support for assistance.
profile.signOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.failedSignOut: Failed to sign out. Please try again.
profile.downloadPdf: Download a beautifully formatted PDF of your entire 180-day wellness journey, including all journal entries.
profile.failedGenerateSummary: Failed to generate your journey summary. Please try again.
profile.unlockAllLessons: Unlock all 180 lessons? This will mark every lesson as complete.
profile.allLessonsUnlocked: All 180 lessons unlocked! Quizzes are ready to take fresh.

badges.title: Badges
badges.trackAchievements: Track your achievements on your wellness journey

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: A gentle, holistic approach to lasting transformation. Let's discover your path together.
onboarding.quote: "The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step."

subscription.subtitle: One simple plan. Everything included. Cancel anytime — or finish all 180 lessons and billing stops automatically.
subscription.step1: Tap Subscribe — you'll be taken to a secure web checkout
subscription.step2: Complete payment, then return to the app and tap Restore
subscription.step3: After all 180 lessons: billing stops, you keep 60 days of access
subscription.iapNotAvailable: In-app purchases are not available on this device. Please check your Apple ID settings and try again.
subscription.productNotLoaded: The subscription product could not be loaded. Please restart the app and try again.
subscription.purchaseFailedText: Unable to complete the purchase. Please try again.
subscription.noActiveSubscription: No active subscription was found. If you just completed a purchase, please try again in a few moments.
subscription.restoreFailed: Failed to restore subscription. Please try again.
subscription.appleDisclaimer: Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel subscriptions in your Apple ID account settings.

notifications.title: Your wellness lesson awaits 🌱
messages: Take a few minutes for yourself today. Your next lesson is ready.
Small steps lead to big changes. Ready for today's lesson?
Your wellness journey continues. Let's grow together today!
A moment of self-care is waiting for you. Open your lesson!
You're building something beautiful. Today's lesson is ready.
Today is a fresh start. Your wellness lesson awaits.
Progress happens one day at a time. Ready for today's wisdom?
Your future self will thank you for this moment. Let's begin!
Every lesson is a step forward. Today's journey starts now.
You deserve this time for growth. Your lesson is ready!
